source: INTRO MODULE_ The Basics of Nodes and Node Dojo_2MAY2024.blend
validation: Forcing the supplied scene to its saved frame 1405 produces exact topology and four-decimal local bounds in Blender and GN-VM. Blender's unopened dependency cache still displays the older frame-1 transform until the timeline is evaluated. The MAT helper's Font socket is explicitly unassigned, so both engines correctly omit its glyph branch while retaining the arrow and complete Room/material lesson geometry.
